title: Google Workspace connector (gmail/drive/calendar over Vault OAuth)

implement.detail: git mv google-calendar -> google; apm.yml connectors faculty + provides connector:google + oauth2 catalog (gmail.send/drive.list/calendar.create_event/calendar.list_events); connector.mjs uses GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN (engine-injected from vault.getAccessToken) + REST; gmail.send builds RFC822 (multipart/mixed attachments); dropped python calendar-sync + its render test/fixtures; library.json + google entry; automation-runner-kind.test updated

test.detail: tests/connector-google.test.ts (6): catalog, gmail.send MIME + Bearer, attachment multipart, header-injection sanitized, drive.list ordering, awaiting_connector. validate-fitting google = 4/4 PASS. typecheck clean. seed survivor stack includes google.
test.command: node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/validate-fitting.ts fittings/seed/google && npx vitest run tests/connector-google.test.ts tests/seed.test.ts tests/automation-runner-kind.test.ts

codexReview.detail: Reviewed jointly with C1 (connector contract). R1 needs-attention 3 findings ALL AGREED+FIXED: gmail.send RFC822 header injection (header() strips CR/LF on to/cc/subject + attachment filename/mime), trello missing-board guard, trello URL path-segment encoding. R2 clean approve, no findings.

codexPwTest.detail: connector actions exercised via committed unit tests + the Z1 e2e (real gmail.send)

walkthrough.detail: gmail.send exercised in the Z1 e2e proof (the headline)
